title: Sensor Conveyor Calibration: Step 3
description:
Sensor Conveyor Calibration: Step 3

Sensor Conveyor Calibration: Step 3

Move or place a part at the upstream limit. The upstream limit marks the beginning of the area where the robot will pick up parts.

Move the robot end effector above the part. In this step, only the robot X coordinate is used, so Y and Z are not critical.

Click the Teach button.
